channel.title: tiktokminze TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from tiktokminze

item.title: Since we now have the new ranking system... what's your level and what did you think of the promo matches? Let me know! 🙃 My tip is to find a suitable team and take it easy together. 🥳 I wish you all the best of luck and success! @BORIS thank you ! 💯 #PU
item.description: Since we now have the new ranking system... what's your level and what did you think of the promo matches? Let me know! 🙃 My tip is to find a suitable team and take it easy together. 🥳 I wish you all the best of luck and success! @BORIS thank you ! 💯 #PU

item.title: Hello 🤝🏻 As promised, I've been thinking about it and can now report that we will be starting our first challenge on Friday, January 23, 2026, from 6 PM to 8:30 PM in my livestream. There will be a Team Deathmatch challenge during this time. Whoever beats
item.description: Hello 🤝🏻 As promised, I've been thinking about it and can now report that we will be starting our first challenge on Friday, January 23, 2026, from 6 PM to 8:30 PM in my livestream. There will be a Team Deathmatch challenge during this time. Whoever beats
